bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: find_minimum
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 2 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: round_number
    item_kwarg: value
    static_kwargs:
      decimal_places: 10
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    field: result
    operation: min
  save_as: step_2_calculate_aggregates
outputs_map:
  min: ${step_2_calculate_aggregates.result}
bricks_log_signals: bricks.ai.composer INFO Composing blueprint for task (93 chars), 102 bricks in pool
